message:
fix: manifest/metadata numeric sort + cache key fixes in query-do/master-do

Same class of bugs as the local-executor fixes:

1. query-do and master-do sorted manifest/metadata R2 keys
   lexicographically, picking "9.manifest" as latest instead of
   "10.manifest" for datasets with 10+ versions. Now extracts
   version number and sorts numerically.

2. query-do cache key used `w.column ?? ""` instead of NULL_SENTINEL
   and omitted w.args.default_ for lag/lead window functions.
